MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Mandatory Settlement Conference.
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 611, Judge: James J. McBride, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Joe Vickstein, #4780.

C. Mark Humbert appeared for plaintiff Arizona Tempe Hotel Corporation.
R. Kent Clay appeared for defendant Patri.Merker Architects Incorporated.

Counsel met with the Court in Chambers. Matter is continued to Wednesday, February 2, 2010 @ 4:30 p.m. for further Mandatory Settlement Conference, specially set by the Court. Not Reported.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Set For Trial On Feb-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-28-11 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 611
